_comment: Cases for score_observation_against_candidate and resolve_canonical_event_id. 'observation' is the new incoming event. 'candidates' are existing canonical events. 'expected_match_index' is null if no match expected.

cases.description: Observation shares an article URL with a candidate — should be a hard match regardless of label.
cases.notes: URL overlap triggers hard match at 0.93. Tests that hard rules work.

cases.description: Same ongoing conflict, different ingestion cycle — no URL overlap but strong entity and label match.

observation.label: Sudan RSF advances in Khartoum fighting

candidates.label: Sudan civil war: RSF vs SAF in Khartoum
Gaza conflict: Hamas and Israeli forces

cases.notes: 4 shared entities + partial label match should trigger heuristic boost to >= 0.68. Structured ID overlap adds to score.

cases.description: Two distinct Egyptian events — protest and election — share 'Egypt' and 'Cairo' but are different events.

observation.label: Cairo economic protests clash with police

candidates.label: Egypt election results disputed by opposition

cases.notes: 2 shared entities (Egypt, Cairo) but low label Jaccard (protest != election). Score should fall below 0.62 threshold. Tests that entity overlap alone is not enough.

cases.description: New event with no candidates — should always create a new canonical event.
cases.notes: Trivial base case: empty candidate list always creates new.
